reason_for_decision: Technically coherent, well structured, and strong on linking stabilization behavior to real EO tracking outcomes.
strengths: Explains long-range EO tracking as a line-of-sight control problem rather than only an optics problem.
Connects focal length, residual jitter, settle behavior, and target retention in a way that is useful for real procurement and acceptance testing.
Keeps strong decision value by distinguishing mechanical stabilization, visual tracking, and image-domain compensation.
summary_assessment: A strong professional technical article with clear control-system framing, practical deployment value, and solid depth around long-range EO stabilization.
